creator: bsd@orsolic.org
text:
Closing this.
Seems that this is fixed with commit 2a9d785d67c6d66268d46f4d3ff0f255dc01e9ea in ports (merged on 2023.07.14.).
I guess that I rebuilt kernel and world around that time but didn't update the ports tree, and spent few days rebuilding LLVM and kernel and searching for solution which was already there...

Thanks for the help tho
